mapper.insert: INSERT INTO proj_tb (proj_id, proj_num, proj_name, data_start_row, char_no_col, axis_col, nominal_col, u_tol_col, l_tol_col, measured_value_col, serial_number_source_json, measurement_time_source_json, create_dt, update_dt) VALUES (0, #{projNum}, #{projName}, #{dataStartRow}, #{charNoCol}, #{axisCol}, #{nominalCol}, #{uTolCol}, #{lTolCol}, #{measuredValueCol}, #{serialNumberSourceJson}, #{measurementTimeSourceJson}, NOW(), null)
mapper.select: SELECT pt.proj_id, pt.proj_num, pt.proj_name, pt.data_start_row, pt.char_no_col, pt.axis_col, pt.nominal_col, pt.u_tol_col, pt.l_tol_col, pt.measured_value_col, pt.serial_number_source_json, pt.measurement_time_source_json, pt.create_dt, pt.update_dt, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM proj_tb pt LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON pt.proj_id = ct.proj_id WHERE pt.proj_id = #{projId}

SELECT pt.proj_id, pt.proj_num, pt.proj_name, pt.data_start_row, pt.char_no_col, pt.axis_col, pt.nominal_col, pt.u_tol_col, pt.l_tol_col, pt.measured_value_col, pt.serial_number_source_json, pt.measurement_time_source_json, pt.create_dt, pt.update_dt, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM proj_tb pt LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON pt.proj_id = ct.proj_id
(pt.proj_num LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pt.proj_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY pt.proj_id, ct.char_id

SELECT pt.proj_id, pt.proj_num, pt.proj_name, pt.data_start_row, pt.char_no_col, pt.axis_col, pt.nominal_col, pt.u_tol_col, pt.l_tol_col, pt.measured_value_col, pt.serial_number_source_json, pt.measurement_time_source_json, pt.create_dt, pt.update_dt, ct.char_id as ct_char_id, ct.proj_id as ct_proj_id, ct.char_no as ct_char_no, ct.axis as ct_axis, ct.nominal as ct_nominal, ct.u_tol as ct_u_tol, ct.l_tol as ct_l_tol, ct.create_dt as ct_create_dt, ct.update_dt as ct_update_dt FROM proj_tb pt LEFT JOIN char_tb ct ON pt.proj_id = ct.proj_id ORDER BY pt.proj_id, ct.char_id
mapper.update: UPDATE proj_tb SET proj_num = #{projNum}, proj_name = #{projName}, data_start_row = #{dataStartRow}, char_no_col = #{charNoCol}, axis_col = #{axisCol}, nominal_col = #{nominalCol}, u_tol_col = #{uTolCol}, l_tol_col = #{lTolCol}, measured_value_col = #{measuredValueCol}, serial_number_source_json = #{serialNumberSourceJson}, measurement_time_source_json = #{measurementTimeSourceJson}, update_dt = NOW() WHERE proj_id = #{projId}
